skills.description: Root-cause web failures using Gasoline observability evidence.
Triage broken behavior with evidence-first debugging across logs, network, DOM state, and command results.
Measure and compare performance regressions with repeatable scenarios.
Convert real failures into deterministic regression tests that fail before the fix and pass after.
Validate API behavior against expected contracts using captured requests, responses, and schema checks.
Audit UX clarity and accessibility using screenshots, a11y checks, and information hierarchy review.
Perform a comprehensive logged-in site/product audit with menu mapping, page and feature breakdowns, usability findings, and reproducibility notes.
Build and run reliable demo scripts with evidence capture.
Execute browser automation with robust selectors and bounded recovery.
Validate end-to-end reliability across LLM, MCP, server, and extension.
Audit redaction coverage across logs, diagnostics, and debug output.
Increase test coverage in high-risk and low-coverage areas.
Run release gates and produce a clear go or no-go decision.
Diagnose and repair Gasoline Agentic Browser configuration issues.
